{{Quote|Would you care for some tea while you determine my next chore? I have checked the kitchen stores, and can offer you a choice of Manellan Jasper, Kosh, Bluefruit Kintle…|P-RC3, to Atour Riten|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Kosh''' was a type of [[Tea/Legends|tea]] available in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="DS" /> by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="ERC">The [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] novel, which mentions Kosh, is dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref> Some Kosh was among the kitchen stores aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. On one occasion, [[Librarian droid/Legends|librarian droid]] [[P-RC3]] inquired if [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Chief Librarian/Legends|Chief Librarian]] [[Atour Riten]] wanted some tea, offering him a choice of Kosh, [[Manellan Jasper]], and [[Bluefruit Kintle]].<ref name="DS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kosh was mentioned in [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']], a [[2007]] novel by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]].<ref name="DS" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}}
